ses.configurationset.deliveryoptions.Cfn: Specifies whether messages that use the configuration set are required to use Transport Layer Security (TLS).

ses.configurationset.deliveryoptions.Sen.Description: The name of the dedicated IP pool to associate with the configuration set.

ses.configurationset.deliveryoptions.Tls.Description: Specifies whether messages that use the configuration set are required to use Transport Layer Security (TLS). If the value is `REQUIRE`, messages are only delivered if a TLS connection can be established. If the value is `OPTIONAL`, messages can be delivered in plain text if a TLS connection can't be established.  Valid Values: `REQUIRE | OPTIONAL`
